inputs.label: Total Duration
inputs.businessContext: The total allocated time for completion, e.g., planned maintenance duration.

inputs.label: Elapsed Duration
inputs.businessContext: The time already passed since the start.

inputs.label: Buffer Time
inputs.businessContext: Additional safety margin added to total duration.

inputs.label: Warning Threshold
inputs.businessContext: When remaining time falls below this percent, trigger warning.

inputs.label: Critical Threshold
inputs.businessContext: When remaining time falls below this percent, trigger critical alert.

formulas.status: (((totalDuration + bufferTime - elapsedDuration) / (totalDuration + bufferTime)) * 100) <= criticalThreshold ? 2 : ((((totalDuration + bufferTime - elapsedDuration) / (totalDuration + bufferTime)) * 100) <= warningThreshold ? 1 : 0)
